publishedAbstract: - Ceph health reports that the Crash module has failed with the error message: ``` [ERR] MGR_MODULE_ERROR: Module 'crash' has failed: dictionary changed size during iteration ```- `crash archive` commands fail as well with the same error: ``` sh-5.1$ ceph crash archive-all Error EIO: Module 'crash' has experienced an error and cannot handle commands: dictionary changed size during iteration ```
publishedTitle: ODF : Ceph Crash module has failed with error "dictionary changed size during iteration"
